name: QA 805
description:
PCP QA Test No. 805

Exercise the postfix PMDA.



Copyright (c) 2015 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos7 reproduce
